title: Ischnosiphon petiolatus
taxonomy: Ischnosiphon petiolatus is classified within the family Stemonuraceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the Stemonuraceae family or the Stemonurales order. This family is part of the larger order Celastrales and is closely related to the Celastraceae and Icacinaceae families. The Stemonuraceae family is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical regions, particularly in Asia and Central and South America. Ischnosiphon petiolatus is a species of flowering plant that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Ischnosiphon petiolatus reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
